article.title: StakeDAO exploit creates 5.4 trillion vsdCRV but nets only $91K
article.summary: PeckShield said the attacker bridged 43.7 ETH to Ethereum after minting trillions of vsdCRV, while EmberCN said most of the remaining tokens had insufficient liquidity to sell.

headline: Warner Bros Seeks $15B Loan Amid High Demand

article.title: Warner Bros. Set to Price $15 Billion Loan Deal Amid High Demand
article.summary: Final terms have been set on $15 billion of Warner Bros. Discovery Inc. loans, as the media company refinances debt ahead of its pending acquisition by Paramount Skydance Corp.

headline: CSG Founder Raises $500M for Expansion Plans

article.title: Defense Firm CSG’s Founder Seeks Money to Expand New Group
article.summary: The founder of CSG NV, which completed the biggest ever initial public offering for a pure defense company four months ago, is seeking to raise as much as €200 million ($233 million) this year to expand his industrial group.
